name: raycast-clean-desk
title: Clean Desk
description: Raycast extension to clean and organize desktop files into a configurable folder
author: yuno

commands.name: clean-desktop
commands.title: Clean Desk
commands.subtitle: Clean and organize Desktop
commands.description: Move and organize all Desktop items into a configurable folder

preferences.name: destinationFolderName
preferences.title: Destination Folder Name
preferences.description: Name of the folder where Desktop items will be moved and organized

preferences.name: destinationParentPath
preferences.title: Destination Parent Directory
preferences.description: Choose where the destination folder will be created

preferences.name: openDestinationAfterClean
preferences.title: Settings
preferences.label: Open destination folder after cleaning
preferences.description: If enabled, opens the destination folder when the process finishes

preferences.name: ejectInstallerVolumesAfterClean
preferences.label: Eject mounted installer disks after cleaning
preferences.description: If enabled, ejects mounted installer volumes (e.g. DMG apps) when the command finishes

preferences.name: moveInactiveFiles
preferences.label: Enable moving inactive files to Trash
preferences.description: If enabled, files not opened for more than X days are moved to Trash

preferences.name: inactiveDays
preferences.title: Inactive Days
preferences.description: Days since last access to consider a file inactive
